examples: The repetitive motion inflamed her joint
The dried grass of the prairie kindled, spreading the flames for miles
The setting sun kindled the sky with oranges and reds

meanings.definition: arouse or excite feelings and passions
examples: The ostentatious way of living of the rich ignites the hatred of the poor
The refugees' fate stirred up compassion around the world

meanings.definition: resulting from inflammation; hot and swollen and reddened
lighted with red light as if with flames
examples: streets ablaze with lighted Christmas trees
